# openshift_subscription (Resource)

Manages an OLM Subscription on an OpenShift cluster.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `namespace` (String)
- `package_name` (String)
- `source` (String) CatalogSource name.

### Optional

- `config` (Attributes) Operator subscription configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `install_plan_approval` (String) Install plan approval: 'Automatic' or 'Manual'.
- `kubeconfig` (String) Path to kubeconfig. Overrides provider setting.
- `source_namespace` (String)
- `starting_csv` (String)

### Read-Only

- `current_csv` (String)
- `installed_csv` (String)
- `state` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config`

Optional:

- `env` (List of String) Environment variables as 'KEY=VALUE' strings.
- `resources` (String) Resource requirements as JSON string.
- `tolerations` (String) Tolerations as JSON string.
